questions.question: Explain the difference between confidentiality and integrity in cryptography.
expectedPoints: Integrity implemented through hashes and digital signatures

questions.question: Compare symmetric and asymmetric cryptography, discussing their relative advantages and disadvantages.
expectedPoints: Symmetric: single shared key, faster, key distribution problem
Asymmetric: key pairs, slower, solves distribution problem
Symmetric better for bulk data encryption
Asymmetric enables digital signatures and key exchange
Hybrid systems combine both approaches optimally
